title: Salty Juicy Irish Dum Stir-fry
description: A savory and juicy high-heat dish featuring dumplings in a flavorful sauce made with low-carb-friendly ingredients for a date-night treat.

ingredients.name: ground beef or turkey
ingredients.notes: use lean meat for low carb option

instructions: Heat a non-stick pan over medium-high heat. Add olive oil and swirl to coat the bottom.
Add ground meat and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as you stir-fry for about 5 minutes.
Add ginger paste, soy sauce, salt, pepper, and chili flakes (if using) to the pan. Stir well to combine.
Reduce heat to medium and add dumplings in batches if needed to avoid overcrowding the pan. Cook for 2-3 minutes per batch until fully cooked and golden brown on all sides.
Serve hot with additional soy sauce or lime wedges, if desired.
